<!--
  Two types of PRs use this template — pick the one that matches yours.
  Delete the other section before submitting.
-->

## Type of PR

- [ ] R&D community application (adds `/challenges/<my-github-handle>.md`)
- [ ] SDK code (bug fix, feature, docs, tests for the Python package)

---

<!--
  ===========================================================================
  IF THIS IS AN R&D COMMUNITY APPLICATION — fill in below, delete the SDK section
  ===========================================================================
-->

### R&D community application

Before submitting, confirm:

- [ ] I have a HumanJudge account (signed up at humanjudge.com/auth?role=builder)
- [ ] I connected my GitHub on humanjudge.com/profile (so my PR can be linked to my HumanJudge profile)
- [ ] My challenge result file is at `/challenges/<my-github-handle>.md` and follows the format in `TEMPLATE.md`

**What happens next:**
- Reviewed personally within ~3 business days
- ⭐ Star this repo to get notified when your PR is merged
- After merge: Discord invite arrives via email to the address on your HumanJudge profile
- See [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full flow

### SDK code PR
